title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 233.090 - Board may sell property of district
text:
233.090.  Board may sell property of district. — Said board shall sell any property of such district, on such terms as it may deem proper, when same can no longer be profitably used for road work.
(RSMo 1939 § 8686) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8037; 1919 § 10813; 1909 § 10589
